title: mcp-server protocol (server-side)
description: MCP server-side protocol identifier registered into adapter.protocol-or-transport per D29 + D21 §generalization (workspace-as-MCP-server) + D60 (specialist.skills publicly-exposed slot) + D74 §B (closes Phase C C6 per D68 §A + closure item (b)). Activates an MCP server adapter (workspace-side): exposes the workspace's loaded specialist skills (filtered by publicly-exposed=True per D60) as MCP tools to an MCP client. Tool aggregator walks workspace._substrate.specialist_instances + filters skills + maps to mcp.types.Tool entries via @server.list_tools() decorator on the SDK's lowlevel Server. Tool routing dispatches client @server.call_tool() invocations to specialist.handle_skill(skill_id, params). Per scope-cut C12 + D68 §C closure item (b): in-process self-test harness via mcp.shared.memory.create_connected_server_and_client_session (workspace's own MCP client invokes workspace's own MCP server in same asyncio event loop); real external MCP client reach (Claude Code / Claude Desktop / stdio / SSE / streamable_http) is Phase D pioneer-instance. Distinct from mcp-server-ext (CLIENT-side; 0.1.0 stub + 0.2.0 real-wire); this extension is the SERVER-side counterpart per D21 §generalization workspace-as-MCP-server.
